facebook.caption:
7,649 reviews. 4.8 stars. At a seafood restaurant in Phu Quoc.

Hải sản Động Tôm Hùm hits different. Fresh lobster, grilled prawns, whole fish, $15-30 a head. The kind of place locals eat on special nights and tourists find by accident.

On Đường Bạch Đằng. Go hungry.

Save this for your Phu Quoc trip.
facebook.video_caption: Crabs, lobsters, whole grilled fish landing on the table at Hải sản Động Tôm Hùm. 4.8 stars across 7,649 reviews. $15-30 a person. Book the table first, thank yourself later.
